steps.name: Verify the login page is open
$("by text: Log into Your Account") should be(visible)
Verify the projects page is open
Verify the projects page is open
Create project 'Cartwright-Glover' with multiple suites support
Verify the project creation form is open
$("[data-testid='addEditProjectAnnouncement'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Modi nobis ut perspiciatis cupiditate qui quisquam quos.)
$("by text: Successfully added the new project.") should be(visible)

parameters.name: project
parameters.value: Project(name=Cartwright-Glover, description=Modi nobis ut perspiciatis cupiditate qui quisquam quos.)

steps.name: Verify the projects page is open
Go to Test Suites & Cases section
$("by text: Add Test Suite") should be(visible)
$("[data-testid='editSectionDescription'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Quae illo quis doloremque vel molestias quia.)

parameters.name: suite
parameters.value: Suite(name=Suite_qui, description=Quae illo quis doloremque vel molestias quia.)

steps.name: Verify the suite is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test suite")
Add test case 'Neque et et quisquam exercitationem consequatur.' to suite
Verify the test case creation form is open
Create test case 'Neque et et quisquam exercitationem consequatur.'
$("[data-testid='addEditCaseTitle']") set value(Neque et et quisquam exercitationem consequatur.)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Neque et et quisquam exercitationem consequatur., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Neque et et quisquam exercitationem consequatur., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

steps.name: Verify the test case is created successfully
$("with text: Successfully added the new test case.") should be(visible)
Go to Test Runs & Results section
Open the test run creation form

parameters.name: run
parameters.value: TestRun(name=Run_nostrum, description=Qui accusantium quo dolor et praesentium quaerat.)

steps.name: Verify the test run is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test run")
Export run results to Excel
